ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fisheries" (
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishery */,
  "fishery_name" TEXT /* Name of the fishery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fishery */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the fishery */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fishery was established */,
  "acreage" REAL /* Total area of the fishery in hectares */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water (e.g., fresh, salt) */,
  "management_area" TEXT /* Area or region under which the fishery is managed */,
  "permit_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a permit is required to fish */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fishery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name_alternate" TEXT /* Alternate common name(s) of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, threatened) */,
  "maximum_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the species in years */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the species in meters */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species in kilograms */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landings" (
  "landing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing record */,
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery where the landing occurred */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species landed */,
  "landing_amount" REAL /* Amount of the species landed (in tons) */,
  "landing_year" INTEGER /* Year the landing occurred */,
  "landing_date" TEXT /* Date when the landing occurred */,
  "fishing_vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing vessel */,
  "fishing_method" TEXT /* Method used for fishing (e.g., trawling, netting) */,
  "fishing_season" TEXT /* Season during which the landing occurred */,
  "landing_value" REAL /* Value of the landing in dollars */,
  "landing_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the landing occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_fishery_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishery_id") REFERENCES fisheries ("fishery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_fishing_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_vessel_id") REFERENCES fishing_vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment record */,
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery where the recruitment occurred */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species recruited */,
  "recruitment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the species recruited (in tons) */,
  "recruitment_year" INTEGER /* Year the recruitment occurred */,
  "recruitment_date" TEXT /* Date when the recruitment was recorded */,
  "recruitment_method" TEXT /* Method used to record recruitment (e.g., sampling, survey) */,
  "recruitment_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the recruitment was recorded */,
  "recruitment_value" REAL /* Value of the recruitment in dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_fishery_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishery_id") REFERENCES fisheries ("fishery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomass" (
  "biomass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biomass record */,
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery where the biomass was measured */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "biomass_amount" REAL /* Amount of the species biomass (in tons) */,
  "biomass_year" INTEGER /* Year the biomass was measured */,
  "biomass_date" TEXT /* Date when the biomass was measured */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used to measure biomass (e.g., satellite, survey) */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the biomass was measured */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the biomass measurement */,
  "biomass_value" REAL /* Value of the biomass in dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biomass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomass_fishery_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishery_id") REFERENCES fisheries ("fishery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomass_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow" (
  "cash_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow record */,
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery */,
  "average_cash_flow" REAL /* Average cash flow (in dollars) */,
  "cash_flow_year" INTEGER /* Year the cash flow was calculated */,
  "cash_flow_date" TEXT /* Date when the cash flow was calculated */,
  "source_of_income" TEXT /* Source of the income (e.g., sales, government grants) */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the year */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit for the year */,
  "cash_flow_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the cash flow was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flow_fishery_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishery_id") REFERENCES fisheries ("fishery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effort" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effort record */,
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery */,
  "total_effort" REAL /* Total effort (in hours) */,
  "effort_year" INTEGER /* Year the effort was calculated */,
  "effort_date" TEXT /* Date when the effort was calculated */,
  "fishing_vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing vessel */,
  "fishing_method" TEXT /* Method used for fishing (e.g., trawling, netting) */,
  "fishing_season" TEXT /* Season during which the effort was calculated */,
  "effort_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the effort was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effort_fishing_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_vessel_id") REFERENCES fishing_vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effort_fishery_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishery_id") REFERENCES fisheries ("fishery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishery_species" (
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fishery_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., trawler, seiner) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vessel in tons */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vessel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vessel */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_vessels_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES vessel_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomass_records" (
  "biomass_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biomass record */,
  "fishery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishery */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "biomass_amount" REAL /* Amount of the species biomass (in tons) */,
  "biomass_year" INTEGER /* Year the biomass was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biomass_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomass_records_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomass_records_fishery_id FOREIGN KEY ("fishery_id") REFERENCES fisheries ("fishery_id")
)
